meaning: n.<美俚>(不喜欢摇滚乐或流行音乐等的)老古板
examples: Boats needing to be lifted up enter the canal basin at the level of the Forth & Clyde Canal and then enter the lower gondola of the Wheel.
Pluto may be a dwarf planet now, Clyde baby, but you're still the first American to discover a planet in my book.
Private contractors are to take over the maintenance of Britain's nuclear weapons on the Clyde.
